title: polypodium nummularium
intro: Polypodium nummularium, also known as Polypodium leucotomos in some sources, is a type of plant species belonging to the Polypodiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which make it effective against various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium nummularium include its potential to protect against skin damage caused by UV radiation, improve liver function, and enhance the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polypodium nummularium are typically made into capsules, tablets, or topical creams, and are available in some health food stores or online, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
